product_results.title: Ailun 3 Pack Screen Protector for iPhone 17 / iPhone 16 Pro [6.3 inch] with Installation Frame, Tempered Glass, Sensor Protection, Dynamic Island Compatible, Case Friendly

summary.text: This screen protector receives positive feedback for its quality, with customers describing it as a good product and very good screen protector. Installation proves straightforward, with users finding it happy and easy to install. The functionality performs well, as customers report it works very good and the screen protectors work good. However, customers experience issues with screen size, while opinions vary regarding drop resistance, alignment, and bubble-free installation.

authors_reviews.title: Great product with good protection. Easy to install.
authors_reviews.author: Paul Nichols

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: The screen protectors were installed without any issues. Easy to install and instructions are easy to follow.
authors_reviews.author: Deank

authors_reviews.title: Great
authors_reviews.text: Best I’ve used. Went on flawlessly. Recommend watching the 30s video. Replaced 2 with 0 bubbles.
authors_reviews.author: StaJay

authors_reviews.title: Solid Glass, But Edges Bubble Quickly - SOLVED by their Excellent Customer Service
authors_reviews.text: Amendment to my review:After posting my initial feedback about the faulty iPhone screen protector, I was contacted by their customer service team. They were extremely helpful, responsive, and professional, offering me the option to either exchange the item or receive a full refund. I really appreciate how quickly they resolved the issue, and their excellent support deserves to be highlighted.---I tried all three protectors in this pack on my iPhone 13 Pro Max. They looked perfect when applied, but bubbles started forming along the edges very quickly.The glass itself feels sturdy and protective, but the adhesive around the edges doesn’t hold up well over time. It might work fine for casual use, but for me, it didn’t provide a consistently smooth, bubble-free experience.
authors_reviews.author: Georgie

authors_reviews.title: Great Screen saver
authors_reviews.text: Great product. Easy to apply. perfect screen protector.
authors_reviews.author: Helen

authors_reviews.title: Crystal clear and incredibly easy to install!
authors_reviews.text: I am beyond impressed with this screen protector. I’m usually terrible at aligning these things, but the installation was seamless and bubble-free.The glass feels just as smooth as the original screen, and the touch sensitivity is perfect—you can’t even tell it’s on! It also does a great job at resisting fingerprints. If you’re looking for premium protection without the headache of a messy application, this is the one to get.Highly recommended!
authors_reviews.author: Rviamonte

authors_reviews.title: Good Product
authors_reviews.text: These are generally great. If you work in very hot conditions go with another brand though as they do crack very easily in that environment.
authors_reviews.author: Shaw
